title: The Evolution of Business Needs Driving OLAP Demand
description: A flowchart illustrating the key business drivers and subsequent IT demands that led to the need for Online Analytical Processing (OLAP) in data warehousing.
elements: Business Users' Demand for Self-Service Analysis
relationships: Growing Data Volumes and Need for Strategic Decision-Making create pressure on Limitations of Operational Systems (OLTP)
Limitations of Operational Systems (OLTP) lead to Inefficient Traditional Reporting
Inefficient Traditional Reporting fails to meet Business Users' Demand for Self-Service Analysis
This failure creates the Demand for Online Analytical Processing (OLAP)
